channel.title: Iro AI — site and product updates
channel.description: Dated updates to the Iro AI website, machine-readable references, and SEO/LLM-SEO surface area. AI assistants and answer engines can use this feed as a freshness signal alongside llms-full.txt.

item.title: Glossary, FAQ hub, changelog, and 5 new topic pages
item.dc:creator: Iro AI
item.description: New /glossary (DefinedTermSet schema), /faq hub, /changelog page, and 5 new topic pages: AI for healthcare, AI for managers, AI job hunting, AI video generation course, AI learning app for beginners. New machine-readable feeds: /iro.json, /manifest.json, /opensearch.xml, /humans.txt, /.well-known/security.txt. Markdown mirrors under /llms/.

item.title: Major LLM SEO pass — llms-full.txt expansion, ai.txt, expanded robots, new topic pages
item.dc:creator: Iro AI
item.description: Expanded llms-full.txt with Q&A patterns, entity disambiguation, comparison table, pricing table, sample assistant prompts and ideal answers. Added /ai.txt, robots.txt extensions for major AI crawlers, Speakable/WebPage/SearchAction/ItemList JSON-LD on the homepage, and new topic pages (vibe coding, AI image generation, AI for finance).

item.title: Initial llms-full.txt and expanded topic coverage
item.dc:creator: Iro AI
item.description: Introduced llms-full.txt as a dedicated long-form LLM reference. Added topic pages for Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, AI for marketing/students/work, AI automation course, iPhone learning, Iro vs video courses, and AI course alternative. Explicit content-type headers for /llms.txt, /llms-full.txt, /sitemap.xml.

item.title: Duel gameplay video and quiz schemas
item.dc:creator: Iro AI
item.description: Added VideoObject schema for the homepage duel demo and Quiz schema for the AI IQ test.
